experience.duration: We built MediMind AI, a solution designed to help rural communities access healthcare more easily through three simple approaches:
experience.description: 3w                       Report this post               Parshva Shah shared this         From multiple attempts to our first big win! After participating in many hackathons, learning from failures, and continuously improving, our persistence finally paid off. I’m happy to share that our team became First Runner-Up 🏆 at the CVMU Hackathon 2026, organized by CVM UNIVERSITY in collaboration with MBIT-CVM University and A D Patel Institute of Technology, CVM University. 💡 Our Project: MediMind AI

experience.duration: Sharing knowledge in the domain you are passionate about always brings immense satisfaction—and this experience was no different! What made it even more exciting was that we started hands-on learning right from the very first session, making the entire workshop practical and engaging. 💡💻

experience.description: Report this post               Parshva Shah liked this         Dhyey Sutariya         Dhyey Sutariya       1w               Parshva Shah liked this         Rejection hasn’t stoped me.  Most people avoid rejection. I am trained for it. Every “no” is leverage: – It filters out the uninterested. – It sharpens my pitch – It builds anti-fragility in me. education.duration: I’m happy to share that our team became First Runner-Up 🏆 at the CVMU Hackathon 2026, organized by CVM UNIVERSITY in collaboration with MBIT-CVM University and A D Patel Institute of Technology, CVM University.

Super proud to share that me and my friend Hitarth Thakkar (Team 38) secured 🥇 1st place at HackQuest Arena CTF, organized by CHARUSAT University during the Cognizance event — along with a cash prize of ₹5000 💸

Madhuben and Bhanubhai Patel Institute of Technology (MBIT-CVM University), The Charutar Vidhya Mandal (CVM UNIVERSITY) proudly celebrates the remarkable success of our student team, who secured 2nd Prize along with a cash award of ₹7.50 Lakhs at the prestigious ROBOFEST GUJARAT 5.0 – Grand Finale, held at Gandhinagar on 21st March 2026.

Madhuben and Bhanubhai Patel Institute of Technology (MBIT-CVM University), The Charutar Vidhya Mandal (CVM UNIVERSITY) proudly celebrates the remarkable success of our student team, who secured 2nd Prize along with a cash award of ₹7.50 Lakhs at the prestigious ROBOFEST GUJARAT 5.0 – Grand Finale, held at Gandhinagar on 21st March 2026.
